=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (6:3-6:15) TS377099: `Effect.ignore` expresses ignored failure more directly than `Effect.catch` returning `Effect.void`. effect(catchToIgnore)
  Fix 0: "Disable catchToIgnore for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable catchToIgnore for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.ignore"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable catchToIgnore for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable catchToIgnore for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.ignore" ===

--- file:///.src/catchToIgnore_preview.ts ---
import { Effect } from "effect"

declare const program: Effect.Effect<void, string, never>

export const recovered = program.pipe(
  Effect.ignore
)
